description.en: When True, spaces immediately following the delimiter are ignored. The default is False. When combining delimiter=' ' with skipinitialspace=True, unquoted empty fields are not allowed.

excerpt.es: When True, spaces immediately following the delimiter are ignored. The default is False. When combining delimiter=' ' with skipinitialspace=True, unquoted empty fields are not allowed.

description.en: When True, raise exception Error on bad CSV input. The default is False.

excerpt.es: When True, raise exception Error on bad CSV input. The default is False.
excerpt.en: When True, raise exception Error on bad CSV input. The default is False.

description.en: The Sniffer class is used to deduce the format of a CSV file. The Sniffer class provides two methods: sniff(sample, delimiters=None)¶ Analyze the given sample and return a Dialect subclass reflecting the parameters found. If the optional delimiters parameter is given, it is interpreted as a string containing possible valid delimiter characters. has_header(sample)¶ Analyze the sample text (presumed to be in CSV format) and return True if the first row appears to be a series of column headers. ...
